description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with two main building volumes, one of which is two stories high and the other single-story. The property is enclosed by a low white wall and includes a driveway leading to a covered carport. The front facade showcases large floor-to-ceiling windows and a glass-enclosed sunroom or conservatory, providing ample natural light. The backyard is landscaped with a green lawn, shrubs, and a paved patio area, while the side of the house is lined with trees for privacy. The exterior is finished in a combination of white and gray, with some sections featuring a green roof or terrace. The overall layout is open and contemporary, with clear separation between living and utility spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a glass sunroom, and landscaped yard, enclosed by a white wall and featuring a driveway with a carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, carport, main entrance, glass sunroom, and a portion of the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the backyard, green lawn, patio, and a row of trees along the wall.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the two main building volumes, backyard, and the paved patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite front view with a clear look at the carport, main entrance, and the row of trees along the side wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
